site.title: Golf & Outdoor | ION Print & Promo
site.description: Custom golf & fun outdoor promo products! Golf balls, towels, umbrellas, frisbees & event gear. Perfect for tournaments, staff events & organizations.

centreText.title: Built For Events & Everyday Use
centreText.description: Built for tournaments, events, gifting & everyday use, these home & outdoor promo products help your brand stand out.

featureImage.imageAlt: Custom branded golf and outdoor promo products

features.title: Golf & Tournaments
features.description:
Golf tournaments & custom golf-themed gifts help your organization win big. Whether it's a charity fundraiser, annual event, staff day or a weekend round with friends, golf gear drives your brand further.

  • Custom branded golf balls
  • Golf towels & accessories
  • Divot tools & ball markers
  • Golf umbrellas
  • Branded golf shirts & hats
  • Tournament prizes & sponsor packages

Premium golf products create stronger event experiences & higher-value brand impressions.

features.title: Outdoor Gear
features.description:
Order these popular, customizable outdoor items for your camps, schools, churches or community programs. Simple, practical & highly reused — exactly what you need to create great experiences.

  • Frisbees & outdoor games
  • Sunglasses & summer accessories
  • Drawstring bags & totes
  • Picnic, lunch & camping gear

Pair with apparel & drinkware for full event kits that are fun, useful & easy to hand out.

features.title: Home & Comfort
features.description:
Better gifts = better branding. Home, comfort & lifestyle swag is exactly what you need for client, staff & holiday gifts.

  • Blankets & throws
  • Cutting boards & charcuterie boards
  • Coasters & premium drinkware
  • BBQ tools & kitchen gift sets
  • Travel kits & comfort items
  • Pet accessories, including bandanas, bowls & collars
  • Lip balm, lunch containers, candles & more

These items are popular with realtors, businesses, non-profits & community organizations looking for something practical, meaningful & memorable.
